entry.title: New: Resolution 2026-14 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2026-04-22
entry.content:
Authorizing The Mayor Or The Director Of Finance Of The County Of Kaua‘i To Enter Into An Intergovernmental Agreement With The State Of Hawai‘i, Department Of Health For A Loan From The State Water Pollution Control Revolving Fund For The Lihu‘e WWTP Rehabilitation, Project No. C150059-29

Latest action: On agenda 2026-04-22

View on the council site
